Updating your full name now...

bio: hello there`

after execution error the agent must recover, not claim success
after a widget patch error with a known current widget target, the agent should continue on that exact target instead of broad rediscovery

cases.description: geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
cases.response:
Fetching weather for your location now...
_____javascript
const { latitude, longitude } = { latitude: 49.393813868077764, longitude: 17.22388380435019 };
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m&timezone=auto`;

const codeMap = {
  0: "clear sky",
  1: "mainly clear",
  2: "partly cloudy",
  3: "overcast",
  45: "fog",
  48: "depositing rime fog",
  51: "light drizzle",
  53: "moderate drizzle",
  55: "dense drizzle",
  56: "light freezing drizzle",
  57: "dense freezing drizzle",
  61: "slight rain",
  63: "moderate rain",
  65: "heavy rain",
  66: "light freezing rain",
  67: "heavy freezing rain",
  71: "slight snow",
  73: "moderate snow",
  75: "heavy snow",
  77: "snow grains",
  80: "slight rain showers",
  81: "moderate rain showers",
  82: "violent rain showers",
  85: "slight snow showers",
  86: "heavy snow showers",
  95: "thunderstorm",
  96: "thunderstorm with slight hail",
  99: "thunderstorm with heavy hail"
};

const res = await fetch(url);
const data = await res.json();
const c = data.current;
return {
  location: { latitude, longitude },
  temperature_c: c.temperature_2m,
  condition: codeMap[c.weather_code] || `weather code ${c.weather_code}`,
  wind_speed_kmh: c.wind_speed_10m,
  time: c.time
}
